case_title: SAN FRANCISCO COMPREHENSIVE SHUTTLE TOURS VS. ADAM MAIN

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM DEFENDANT FILED BY DEFENDANT MAIN, ADAM

ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) *GRANTED* FOR HEARING DATE 11/19/13 AT 1:30PM
EXHIBITS RECEIVED BY DEFENDANT-FORWARDED TO COURTROOM TO THE FILE FOR THE 11-19-13 HEARING.
